seniority_evidence: own the intelligence layer of Redrob's product
must_have_skills: Production experience with embeddings-based retrieval systems
Production experience with vector databases or hybrid search infrastructure
Hands-on experience designing evaluation frameworks for ranking systems
nice_to_have_skills: Experience with learning-to-rank models (XGBoost-based or neural)
Prior exposure to HR-tech, recruiting tech, or marketplace products
Background in distributed systems or large-scale inference optimization
Open-source contributions in the AI/ML space
core_problems_to_solve: The high-level mandate is to own the intelligence layer of Redrob's product, which includes the ranking, retrieval, and matching systems that decide what recruiters see when they search for candidates and what candidates see when they search for roles. The role involves designing and developing a v2 ranking system, setting up evaluation infrastructure, and driving the long-term architecture of candidate-JD matching at scale.
